title: Setting date on activities
excerpt: When creating a new activity using  “emails and activities” there is a calender that pops up to set the date. If you want to set something out for a year later, you have to scroll through every month on the calendar to g…

posts.author: jasonhartwell (Jason Hartwell)
posts.cookedHtml:
When creating a new activity using “emails and activities” there is a calender that pops up to set the date. If you want to set something out for a year later, you have to scroll through every month on the calendar to get to a date a year in the future.

When setting a date in a column, the calendar that pops up allows you to jump ahead by the year. Is there any way to get the same calendar that you use on columns to pop up when you are setting a date in emails and activities?
